name: The Great Coliseum
descriptionSeed: Champions of every Reach, in ritual contest, for entertainment and wealth and prestige — and the whole world watches. This is where a Blazeborn and an Umbral can face each other and NOT annihilate each other, because here it is a game with rules and an audience, and both walk out. The Coliseum is the center's genius: it takes the thing that would otherwise be a war and makes it a spectacle people pay to see. It is also, obviously, a war being held very carefully in a bottle. Bouts here are FOUGHT, not described. A challenge issued on the sand is answered in earnest, under forms, and the crowd reads every exchange — they know the grid, they know which cell was drawn, and they will tell you afterward exactly where it turned.
encounterFlavor: Champions of the twenty-four; bookmakers who know the odds across every axis; a fighter who has stopped being able to tell contest from war.
questSeeds: A contest is going to become a real killing and everyone can feel it
A champion has been asked to throw a bout, and the person asking represents their entire people

encounterSeeds.hint: A Marcher holds the sand today and the bout board has your name free
Oreth is taking challengers — the Standing Wound, and he has never lost it badly
Vantia is holding the line cell again; the stands are betting on the bell
Sethran calls the bout aloud as he fights, and the crowd comes for that
Bricke has been granted his satchel, which means the sand will not stay flat
Lys is on the board, and the crowd is already on their side
Aro has not been touched in this arena in two seasons
Hallis is taking the Attrition, and it will not be over quickly
